title: Notice of intersection closure at Louis Fourie road and Garret Street
description: BUSINESS NEWS - The seaside leg of Garret...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - The seaside leg of Garret Street Intersection with Louis Fourie Road will be closed for reconstruction from 30 April to 17 May 2025 (weather permitting).","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - The seaside leg of Garret Street Intersection with Louis Fourie Road will be closed for reconstruction from 30 April to 17 May 2025 (weather permitting)."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Alternative routes are via Vlei Road (Bay View residents) and the new Gericke Link Road (Industrial area motorists). We apologise for the inconvenience and thank you for your patience"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Western Cape Government is working hard to maintain our roads. Please drive carefully during this period of construction. Let us work together to ensure that our roads are safe. FOR YOU.","html":"The Western Cape Government is working hard to maintain our roads. Please drive carefully during this period of construction. Let us work together to ensure that our roads are safe. FOR YOU."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
